creator: Thomas Hassett
Miguel O'Reilly
subject: Baptisms
Catholic Church

Colonial Florida
metadata.description: Spanish colonial parish register entries from San Agustín, East Florida, dating from May to November 1794. This record includes pages 26-28 and entries 56 through 62. The entries, written in Spanish cursive, document the baptisms of various individuals, including free and enslaved people of color ('negro libre', 'esclavo', 'niño de color') and enslaved persons belonging to Don Juan Macqueen. The records provide names of the baptized, birth dates, parents, and godparents, and are signed by Father Thomas Hassett and Father Miguel O'Reilly.
metadata.source: Parish Register of the Cathedral Basilica of St. Augustine
